sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54770" key="katapeplanhme/nws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπεπλᾰνημένως</orth>, <sense id="n54770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">erroneously</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l.for</abbr> sq., in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.51</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπεπλασμένως</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">affectedly</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
